commands: echo '=== pip install attempt ===' && /app/.venv/bin/pip install --require-hashes -r requirements-lock.txt 2>&1 || (echo '=== pip exited non-zero, dumping context ===' && echo 'pwd:' && pwd && echo 'python version:' && /app/.venv/bin/python --version && echo 'pip version:' && /app/.venv/bin/pip --version && echo 'lockfile head:' && head -3 requirements-lock.txt && exit 1)
